sglang.title: Use cuda event wait and synchronization instead of busy waiting
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Simplify the event sync for overlap scheduler

sglang.title: Fix: incorrect top_logprobs in chat completion
sglang.author: ajwaitz
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
I noticed that chat completion with a defined top_logprobs value was returning incorrect top_logprobs beyond position 0 in the sequence. In the return object's logprobs.content field, each token in the sequence should have some number of top log probabilities, captured from the decoding s

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.

 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

sglang.title: Use native fp8 format on MI300X
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Use natively support e5m2 format on MI300X, so HW accelerated conversion can kick in.
Modifications

On none MI GPUs, or none native FP8 supported MI GPUs, no perf difference (as all done in torch emulation).
Checklist

[+] Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
[+] Add uni

sglang.title: Make constrained decoding work for overlap scheduler
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Use fine-grained synchronization to overlap the logit mask processing and model forward.

sglang.title: Set schedule policy less conservative for DP attention
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Set schedule policy less conservative for DP attention

sglang.title: Enable overlap by default
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Turn on --enable-overlap-schedule by default. The overlap scheduler now works for most use cases except for the following todo items. Since the following items are not commonly used, we temporarily disable the overlap scheduler for these cases. They will be supported in the follow-up PRs.
Todo items

vllm.title: [Misc] Avoid misleading warning messages
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For QWenLMHeadModel and ChatGLMForCausalLM, where multimodal model  and LLM share the same model class, incorrect warning messages are output when enabling LoRA for LLM.
BTW, fix  QWenLMHeadModel small typo.
ping @DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Doc] Add the start of an arch overview page
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
My intent with this page is to provide a high-level architectural
overview of the major components of vLLM by taking a look one layer at
a time. So far, I have the first two sections: entrypoints and the LLM
engine.
The diagrams here were build with excalidraw,
which embeds diagram metadata into the

vllm.title: [misc][plugin] improve plugin loading
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: the plugin can be loaded for multiple times, especially in the first process we launch. this can be annoying for users.

vllm.title: [CI][CPU] adding numa node number as container name suffix
vllm.author: zhouyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This path adds NUMA node number as the container name suffix

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix hermes tool parser output error stream arguments in some cases (#10395)

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[BugFix] Fix hermes tool parser output error stream arguments in some cases (#10395)
Use delta_text to return directly to the user, preventing errors caused by partial_json_parser during the incremental computation of parameters.
FIX #9693
FIX #9908
FIX #10395

vllm.title: [Pixtral-Large] Pixtral actually has no bias in vision-lang adapter
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Pixtral-Large doesn't have any bias in the vision lang adapter as can be seen from: https://huggingface.co/mistralai/Pixtral-Large-Instruct-2411/tree/main?show_file_info=consolidated.safetensors.index.json
Before this PR the bias weights were initialized to such small values that it essentially didn

vllm.title: Fix: Build error seen on Power Architecture
vllm.author: mikejuliet13
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The issue in the vLLM library involves the introduction of the -mf16c flag and FP16 vector types, which are specific to x86 architecture. These changes cause build failures on Power architecture, though the library builds and functions correctly on x86. To resolve this, architecture-specific checks

vllm.title: [Doc] fix link for page that was renamed
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
PR #10368 combined the content from class_hierarchy into an expanded
arch_overview page. I missed that a link to the old page existed
here in the code.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [6/N] torch.compile rollout to users
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
the user interface:
command line:
short: -O 0/1/2/3
long: --compilation-config json_string
vllm.LLM:
users can construct CompilationConfig object directly, and pass compilation_config=obj .
the first roll out will only roll out 3 levels, more fine-grained control will come later as we stabilize them

[Core] Avoid metrics log noise when idle

Prior to this change, there was always a log message every 10 seconds,
even whe

vllm.title: [Model][Quantization] HQQ support through Marlin kernel expansion
vllm.author: ElizaWszola
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables HQQ support (float zero points) in float16 kernels. This PR supports 4-bit quantization and group_size 64.
unit tests:
pytest tests/kernels/test_marlin_gemm.py -k test_hqq_marlin_gemm

offline inference model:
nm-testing/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-HQQ

or
from vllm import LLM
import torch

vllm.title: Change granite chat template to keep json list formatting for tool calls
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR changes the granite chat template to change how tool calls are rendered so that the way in which the model reads the tool call input is the same as how it generates it.
FIX #10379
Taking an example from our unit tests, here is the effect of the change:
BEFORE:
<|start_of_role|>available_tool

vllm.title: [Misc] Add __setitem__ for LazyDict
vllm.author: liuyanyi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Our internal codebase is using vllm to deploy private models. We need to register custom activation functions to the Registry, but currently, LazyDict does not support item assignment and throws the following error:
TypeError: 'LazyDict' object does not support item assignment

This simple modificat

vllm.title: [ci/build] Combine nightly and optional
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Change nightly tests to be optional and remove nightly key
Make A100 tests to be optional
Remove nightly key
From now on (after vllm-project/ci-infra#51 is merged), all scheduled nightly tests will run all optional tests automatically. Other than that, optional tests remain optional to run.

vllm.title: [model] Reduce medusa weight
vllm.author: skylee-01
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Medusa predicts N tokens in speculative decoding and trains N lheads，In actual deployments, only ResidualBlock is usually trained, not lm_head.So I just keep a copy of lm_head and share it in different heads. In practice, every lm_head saved will reduce 1G of HBM, which is crucial on graphics cards

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Handle conflicts between modern and legacy fields
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: While debugging #10293, I found that the current rope patching logic may silently skip the old rope_scaling["type"] if the newer rope_scaling["rope_type"] is also given. This PR adds a check that raises an error if the two fields are incompatible with each other.
